a.xlink:title: Returns the querier for performing card lookups.
Returns the CardDatabaseQuerier of the singleton database.
Adds a card using the preferred printing if available.
Creates and shows a custom context menu when the right mouse button is clicked.
Syncs the contents of the child widgets with the current deck.
Resolves the complete display name of a card.
Rebuilds the model tree from the underlying node tree.
Sets the deck for this tab.
